title: Generated CLI Progressive Maturity For Issue 641
goal: Implement #641 and its child issues (#642, #643, #644) using the package's progressive-maturity model and high-assurance workflow.
non_goals: Do not promote mutation-capable generated adapters before dry-run, preflight, refusal, and review-gate conformance exist.
Do not make Node or Docker required for ordinary Python development.
Do not move runtime primitive behavior into generated adapter code.

intent.outcome: Generated CLI adapters become the interface authority for the first proven root and package-local read-only commands, with remaining command families routed through explicit progressive-maturity follow-up.
intent.constraints: Use checked-in planning, preserve runtime primitive ownership, keep generated outputs derived from contracts/IR, and report dogfooding findings through the host-repo template.
intent.latitude: Promote commands only to the maturity level their proof supports; create or update child issues for expansion lanes that are not safe to promote yet.
intent.escalation: Stop and route follow-up if a command needs new runtime primitive boundaries, lifecycle mutation gates, or cross-package changes beyond the planned surfaces.

execution.next_step: Continue #643 by evaluating the remaining root diagnostic/reporting commands (`report`, `reconcile`, `setup`, `status`, and `doctor`) for generated read-only adapter promotion or explicit maturity deferral.
execution.proof: Focused generated-adapter proof, Node-backed package conformance, full make check, and dogfooding closeout selectors passed for the expanded root read-only promotion batch.

invariants: Generated parser/help/dispatch wiring is derived from command_package_ir.json.
Hand-written CLI code owns runtime primitive behavior only after generated parser/dispatch accepts a promoted command.
Progressive maturity is explicit per target and command family.
Mutation-capable generated adapters remain deferred until required conformance exists.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Finish the migration to single-source generated executable adapters without weakening safety boundaries.
intent_continuity.this slice completes the larger intended: yes for the parent #641 enabling milestone; expansion remains tracked by #642, #643, and #644.
intent_continuity.continuation surface: GitHub issues #642, #643, and #644 plus this PR's review artifacts.

required_continuation.required follow-on for the larger intend: Implement remaining command families through #642, #643, and #644 after this progressive-maturity foundation lands.
required_continuation.activation trigger: When another command family is selected for generated adapter promotion.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Runtime-backed generated Python parser/dispatch for root defaults/config/modules/start/summary/implement/preflight/proof/ownership/skills, plus Planning `status` and Memory `status`; static checks enforce generated routing before handwritten parsers.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: Root diagnostic/reporting commands that still need separate conformance (`report`, `reconcile`, `setup`, `status`, `doctor`), package-local read-only breadth beyond status, and lifecycle dry-run/mutation generated adapters.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: High-assurance generated-adapter work must activate checked-in planning before implementation, not only during closeout.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: Continue #643 by evaluating the remaining root diagnostic/reporting commands (`report`, `reconcile`, `setup`, `status`, and `doctor`) for generated read-only adapter promotion or explicit maturity deferral.

intent_interpretation.literal request: Ingest and implement #641 in a new branch, create a PR, use high-assurance workflow, report using the dogfooding template, implement full intent, create child issues if necessary, and implement child issues using progressive maturity.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Use the package's own planning, maturity, proof, and dogfooding surfaces while completing the generated CLI adapter migration foundation.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Promote the first root and package-local read-only commands to runtime-backed generated Python adapters, document the maturity matrix, and keep lifecycle mutation deferred behind explicit proof gates.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Check that the PR closes the parent enabling milestone without falsely claiming mutation-capable generated adapters are ready.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: Generated CLI contracts, command-generation package, root/planning/memory CLI entrypoints, generated outputs, generated package checks, focused tests, docs/reviews, and this planning state.
execution_bounds.max changed files: Broad but bounded to generated CLI adapter migration and planning/reporting artifacts.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --conformance --require-node; make check; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section workflow_obligations --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section closeout_trust --format json; uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json; uv run agentic-workspace skills --target . --task "dogfooding closeout review" --format json
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Ask before changing unrelated CLI command behavior, lifecycle mutation semantics, package versioning, or broad docs architecture.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Unrelated schema annotation/docs cleanup, unrelated planning archive cleanup, or package-local command families not named in #642/#643/#644.

stop_conditions.stop when: Generated adapters begin owning runtime behavior or mutation-capable routes without the required maturity proof.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: A command cannot be promoted without new primitive contracts or behavior changes outside the issue intent.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: Validation or implementation requires unrelated package rewrites.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: make check or generated conformance reveals a failing invariant that cannot be fixed within the planned surfaces.

context_budget.live working set: Issue #641, child issues #642/#643/#644, this execplan, command_package_ir, generator, generated package checks, and root/planning/memory CLI entrypoints.
context_budget.recoverable later: Historical CLI audits and older generated-package reviews unless a failing check points there.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update execution_run, proof_report, finished_run_review, dogfooding report, and PR body before pausing.
context_budget.pre-work config pull: Already pulled AGENTS.md, workflow, summary, and issue metadata.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: Use compact Memory routing only if validation or review uncovers durable repo knowledge not represented by docs/checks.
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Generated CLI progressive maturity: finish validation/report/PR from current branch.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Any interruption before make check, PR creation, or closeout must update this execplan first.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Complete the planned generated adapter migration foundation with high assurance.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Use package planning, progressive maturity, generated contract authority, high-assurance validation, dogfooding report, commit/push/PR.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact wording of review/report artifacts and whether a command is mature enough for the next level.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A child issue requires mutation promotion or broad CLI behavior changes beyond available proof.

adaptive_assurance.reason: The work changes shipped CLI entrypoints, generated contracts, adapter safety boundaries, package-local CLIs, and validation gates.
required_gates: generated Python parser/dispatch before handwritten parser

decision_refs: Progressive maturity keeps lifecycle mutation deferred until conformance exists.

invariant_refs: Generated adapters do not own runtime primitive behavior.

forbidden: network-dependent runtime behavior beyond GitHub issue/PR metadata

common_risks: Handwritten parser remains hidden interface authority.
Generated code accidentally owns runtime behavior.
Mutation commands promoted before safety gates.
non_goals: All commands mutation-capable in this PR.
durable_residue_prompts: Record whether package planning should guard high-assurance work earlier.

decision_refs: Use runtime-backed-read-only-adapter for first Python promotions; keep lifecycle mutation deferred.
architecture_decision_promotion.notes: A full ADR is not needed unless later commands change runtime binding semantics.

threat_failure_aids.concern: Generated adapters could accidentally own runtime primitive behavior.
threat_failure_aids.advisory: Run generated package conformance before claiming runtime-backed maturity.

threat_failure_aids.concern: Lifecycle mutation commands could be promoted before dry-run, preflight, and refusal proof exists.
threat_failure_aids.advisory: Keep mutation-capable promotion behind explicit preflight/refusal conformance.

references.label: lifecycle dry-run and mutation generated-adapter migration

durable_residue.learned constraint: Do not treat high-assurance as validation-only; activate package planning when scope spans contracts, generated outputs, package CLIs, and PR proof.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: The package's own workflow is part of the proof model.
durable_residue.promotion trigger: If similar oversight recurs or a check can enforce it.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, separate acted-on, reported-only/routed, and dismissed incidental findings; keep this compact and evidence-backed.
signals found: High-assurance work began without checked-in planning.
Active execplan next-action guidance is duplicated across fields and can become stale after incremental promotion.
Generated package regeneration can produce line-ending-only working-tree noise.
signals fixed: Created this execplan and will update planning state before continuing.
